name: explorer
content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; media-src 'self' blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self'; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'self' blob:; frame-src 'self' blob:; worker-src 'self' blob:
